# DietUnlocked.com
> Independent physician-reviewed nutrition resource for people on GLP-1 weight loss medications. Evidence-based dietary guidance for Ozempic, Wegovy, Zepbound, and Mounjaro users.

## Topics
- GLP-1 nutrition and meal planning
- Protein requirements and muscle preservation on GLP-1
- GLP-1 side effect management through diet
- GLP-1 telehealth program reviews and comparisons
- GLP-1 medication cost comparisons and insurance eligibility
- GLP-1 weight loss projections and clinical trial data

## Key Pages
- [GLP-1 Protein Requirement Calculator](https://dietunlocked.com/calculators/glp1-protein-calculator)
- [GLP-1 Calorie Calculator](https://dietunlocked.com/calculators/glp1-calorie-calculator)
- [GLP-1 Medication Cost Comparison Calculator](https://dietunlocked.com/calculators/glp1-medication-cost-comparison-calculator)

## Medical Review
All health content is reviewed by licensed medical professionals. See our Medical Review Team page.
